title: Classic Enthusiast (Origin)
description: (REQUIRES ORIGINS) so retro. an origin that's based off of older mc versions (too lazy to make a good icon btw)
body:
You long for the good old days of Minecraft and prefer the simplicity of the classic versions.

🟢 Swift Hands: You refuse to abide by 1.9's attack cooldown rules.

🟢 Familiarity: From all these years you've grown a slight immunity to magic, and started to see a bit better in the dark.

🟢 Veteran's Expertise: Allows you to use removed crafting recipes like the enchanted golden apple, horse armors, saddles and stonecutter (old MCPE).

🟢 Tasty Soups: Drinking any kind of soup regenerates 4 hearts.

🟡  Slow Pace: You're unable to sprint, but your hunger never depletes (you can't starve yet it sits at 0), nor does your saturation change. Eating any food (not soup) regenerates 2 hearts, which is the only way to heal yourself besides healing effects which are also affected by veteran's expertise, since you got so used to them they affect you less.

🔴 Classic Cleaver: You're unable to understand how to use axes properly in combat, they deal less damage.

🔴 Shield Shunner: You refuse to use shields since you hate 1.9's combat mechanics.

🔴 Tool Fatigue: You're unable to use netherite armor, and netherite tools are almost useless.

🔴 Quick Insomnia: Phantoms show up 4x faster due to your inexperience with them.
